title: Marseille’s Tight Mayoral Race Is a Bellwether for France’s Future
summary_full: Voters across France choose mayors this week. The far right is performing strongly in the country’s second city, making the contest there a test of national shifts.
summary_public: Voters across France choose mayors this week. The far right is performing strongly in the country’s second city, making the contest there a test of national shifts.
